name: Axonius
description: Axonius cybersecurity asset management platform integration for asset discovery, device compliance, and user visibility

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Axonius instance
2. For Axonius v6.1.74 and later: go to System Settings > Managing Users and Roles > Managing Service Accounts, create a service account, and copy its API Key and API Secret
3. For older versions (pre-6.1.74): click your user icon > User Settings and copy your API Key and API Secret
4. Enter your full instance URL (e.g. https://mycompany.axonius.com), API Key, and API Secret above
5. More details: https://docs.axonius.com/docs/manage-service-accounts
